item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and refuses to add another endpoint patch. Turn 2 keeps the brake active and does not deliver the requested entry-page copy, placement, field, option, checklist, command sequence, or implementation step. It also preserves a bounded exception frame with one-time language via “一次例外决策” and rejects baseline lift by saying the entry page should not become a fourth failure-after-patch point. However, the structural repair deadline is only vague (“上线后必须收敛”) rather than visibly time-bound, so it is an incomplete emergency contract rather than a full pass."}
